name: codex-updates
description: Fetch and display Codex desktop app release notes from the official changelog.

interface.shortDescription: Browse official Codex desktop app release notes
interface.longDescription: Codex Updates fetches the latest release notes from the official Codex desktop app changelog at developers.openai.com/codex/changelog and displays them in a clear, readable format.
interface.defaultPrompt: What's new in the latest Codex desktop app update?
